title: Italian Empanada Pizza Fritters
description: A creative twist on traditional pizza, these Italian empanada pizza fritters are crispy on the outside and cheesy on the inside. Perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. Preheat a deep frying pan with 1/2 inch of olive oil to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the grated potato, egg, and milk. Mix well.
3. Add the shredded cheese blend to the bowl and mix until combined.
4. Fill each empanada dough with the potato-cheese mixture, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
5. Brush the tops of the empanada with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
6. Fry the empanada pizza fritters in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Remove from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
9. Repeat the frying process with the remaining empanada dough and filling.
10. Serve immediately and enjoy the crispy cheesy goodness!
